name: Auth experience — approval frames
description: Contract-freeze UX artifacts for FuzeFront's complete, professional sign-up & sign-in: inline email-availability, password strength + confirm-match against the real 12+ policy, Cloudflare Turnstile, the email-verification state machine, and the honest no-enumeration password reset. Approving these frames approves the flows, components, packages and contract deltas in `build`. frontend-test-engineer drives Playwright against the data-frame / data-* hooks. Per-flow approval — one approved flow unblocks that flow's implementation.

deltas: NEW endpoint GET /api/v1/security/signup/email-available?email= → { available: boolean } (debounced inline check; must fail-open on error so it never blocks submit; must NOT be an enumeration oracle beyond signup UX — rate-limit + captcha-gate it).
NEW field SignupRequest.turnstileToken (string, required when AuthMethods.captcha present) — Cloudflare Turnstile server-side verification.

NEW AuthMethods.captcha { provider: 'turnstile', siteKey } and AuthMethods.passwordPolicy { minLength: 12, requireUpper, requireLower, requireDigit, requireSymbol } so the strength meter reflects the authoritative policy rather than a hard-coded client copy.

designSystemPrimitives: InlineValidatedInput (Input with a right-adornment slot + valid/invalid ring) — NET-NEW in @fuzefront/design-system
TurnstileContainer (managed-widget shell with loading/verified/failed slots) — NET-NEW
Alert info/success variants — add if not already present

frames.label: Index
frames.summary: Flow walker + build inventory: 5 ordered flow cards, the components/packages/DS-primitive plan, and the three contract deltas.
frames.acceptanceNotes: index links to every frame in order; the build inventory mirrors manifest.build 1:1; every named flow card resolves to its screen.

frames.label: Create account
frames.summary: Signup form: first/last name, email with inline availability ✓, password + strength meter (12+ policy) with per-rule checklist, confirm-password with live match, Cloudflare Turnstile (verified), Google, terms.
frames.acceptanceNotes: Availability adornment reflects data-avail; strength meter data-strength + per-rule data-met from the authoritative passwordPolicy; confirm shows match state; Turnstile token required before submit is enabled; Google gated on AuthMethods.social; no vendor identity-provider name in the DOM.

frames.label: Sign in
frames.summary: Sign-in form: email, password with show/hide, forgot-password link, Turnstile, Google, link to signup.
frames.acceptanceNotes: POST /session; mfa_required response hands off to the MFA challenge (see States); forgot-password routes to reset; Turnstile present; Google gated on AuthMethods.social.

frames.label: Check your inbox
frames.summary: Post-signup 'we sent a link to <email>' screen with a resend button on a countdown cooldown and an edit-address path.
frames.acceptanceNotes: Renders the target email (data-value='email'); resend disabled during cooldown with a live counter, then re-enables (POST /verify/email/start → 202); explains the verify-to-continue gate.

frames.label: Verify link landing
frames.summary: The verify-link landing state machine: verifying (spinner) → verified (continue) or expired/invalid (send a new link).
frames.acceptanceNotes: POST /verify/email/confirm with the link token; 200 VerificationStatus → verified (idempotent for already-verified); EXPIRED/INVALID_CODE → expired with resend; verifying is the transient default.

frames.label: Password reset
frames.summary: Reset request (unconditional 202, identical copy whether or not the account exists) → sent → confirm new password (policy + strength + match) → expired-token.
frames.acceptanceNotes: reset-request always 202 with the same 'check your email' copy (no enumeration); confirm enforces the 12+ policy and match; submit disabled while mismatched; invalid/expired token routes to request-a-new-link.

frames.label: States
frames.summary: Every contract state: email availability idle/checking/available/taken/error, password weak/strong, confirm mismatch, Turnstile loading/verified/failed, submit-in-flight, form errors (invalid credentials, 409 conflict, provider unavailable), MFA-required handoff, verify-to-continue gate.
frames.acceptanceNotes: Each card is addressable by data-state; availability 'taken' offers 'sign in instead'; availability 'error' fails open; Turnstile 'failed' shows the 'please complete the challenge' message; in-flight button is disabled with a spinner.
